name: data-warehouse-analytics-cross-flow-correlation-engine
description: T180 CrossFlowCorrelationEngine — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. Cross-flow joins MUST include tenantId in every predicate. sourceFlows minimum 2. All cross-flow reads are read-only.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: tenantId in every cross-flow join predicate, minimum 2 sourceFlows, all cross-flow reads are read-only, no cross-tenant correlation
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + cross-flow-correlation + tenant-predicate + minimum-source-flows + read-only-joins patterns for T180

Break T180 into: consume queue event → validate sourceFlows.length >= 2 → for each source flow: read data with tenantId predicate → correlate across flows → compute correlation metrics → storeDocument(correlationResult) → return analysis

Generate cross-flow-correlation-engine.service.ts — queue consumer, validates sourceFlows array has minimum 2 entries (INSUFFICIENT_SOURCE_FLOWS error if not). ALL cross-flow DATABASE reads MUST include tenantId predicate from ALS. Read-only — no writes to source flow data. Computes correlation coefficients across flows. DNA-8: storeDocument(correlationResult) before returning.
Named check validation: source_flows_minimum_2, tenant_id_in_every_join, cross_flow_reads_only, no_cross_tenant_correlation, correlation_result_stored
Score generated code 0-100 against T180 iron rules: minimum 2 sourceFlows, tenantId in every predicate, read-only access, tenant isolation
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=minimum-2-sources+tenant-id-all-joins+read-only, rejected=single-source-flow OR join-without-tenant-predicate OR writes-to-source-data. curriculumTier=1.
